headline: It's 4/4, Time to Make a Wish: United & Make-A-Wish to Host 'Make More Wishes' Events Across Nation, Giving Wish Kids Behind-the-Scenes Access to Aviation
summary: United Airlines and Make-A-Wish today announced the launch of "Make More Wishes," seven immersive events across the U.S. giving children fighting critical illnesses and their families behind-the-scenes access to all aspects of aviation.

raw.headline: It's 4/4, Time to Make a Wish: United & Make-A-Wish to Host 'Make More Wishes' Events Across Nation, Giving Wish Kids Behind-the-Scenes Access to Aviation
raw.summary: United Airlines and Make-A-Wish today announced the launch of "Make More Wishes," seven immersive events across the U.S. giving children fighting critical illnesses and their families behind-the-scenes access to all aspects of aviation.

headline: U.S.-Iran war 'tax' begins to hit American businesses and consumers
summary: A U.S.-Iran war 'tax' is beginning to hit consumers as diesel and jet fuel prices rise and stress business profitability, and there is no relief in sight.

raw.headline: U.S.-Iran war 'tax' begins to hit American businesses and consumers
raw.summary: A U.S.-Iran war 'tax' is beginning to hit consumers as diesel and jet fuel prices rise and stress business profitability, and there is no relief in sight.
